title: Shoreditch and Finsbury (UK Parliament constituency)

infobox.value: [Islington South & Finsbury](/wiki/Islington_South_%26_Finsbury "Islington South & Finsbury") [Hackney South & Shoreditch](/wiki/Hackney_South_%26_Shoreditch "Hackney South & Shoreditch")

was a [parliamentary constituency](/wiki/United_Kingdom_constituencies "United Kingdom constituencies") centred on the [Shoreditch](/wiki/Shoreditch "Shoreditch") district of the [East End of London](/wiki/East_End_of_London "East End of London") and the adjacent [Finsbury](/wiki/Finsbury "Finsbury") area. It returned one [Member of Parliament](/wiki/Member_of_Parliament_(United_Kingdom) "Member of Parliament (United Kingdom)") (MP) to the [House of Commons](/wiki/House_of_Commons_of_the_United_Kingdom "House of Commons of the United Kingdom") of the [Parliament of the United Kingdom](/wiki/Parliament_of_the_United_Kingdom "Parliament of the United Kingdom"), using the [first-past-the-post](/wiki/First-past-the-post "First-past-the-post") system of voting.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

(Redirected from [Shoreditch and Finsbury (UK Parliament constituency)](/w/index.php?title=Shoreditch_and_Finsbury_(UK_Parliament_constituency)&redirect=no "Shoreditch and Finsbury (UK Parliament constituency)"))

Parliamentary constituency in the United Kingdom, 1950–1974

This article is about the UK parliamentary constituency. For the former London County Council constituency, see [Shoreditch and Finsbury (London County Council constituency)](/wiki/Shoreditch_and_Finsbury_(London_County_Council_constituency) "Shoreditch and Finsbury (London County Council constituency)").

| Shoreditch and Finsbury | |
| --- | --- |
| Former [borough constituency](/wiki/Borough_constituency "Borough constituency") for the [House of Commons](/wiki/House_of_Commons_of_the_United_Kingdom "House of Commons of the United Kingdom") | |
| [County](/wiki/Ceremonial_counties_of_England "Ceremonial counties of England") | [Greater London](/wiki/Greater_London "Greater London") |
| [1950](/wiki/1950_United_Kingdom_general_election "1950 United Kingdom general election")–[1974 (1974)](/wiki/February_1974_United_Kingdom_general_election "February 1974 United Kingdom general election") | |
| Seats | One |
| Created from | [Shoreditch](/wiki/Shoreditch_(UK_Parliament_constituency) "Shoreditch (UK Parliament constituency)") [Finsbury](/wiki/Finsbury_(UK_Parliament_constituency) "Finsbury (UK Parliament constituency)") |
| Replaced by | [Islington South & Finsbury](/wiki/Islington_South_%26_Finsbury "Islington South & Finsbury") [Hackney South & Shoreditch](/wiki/Hackney_South_%26_Shoreditch "Hackney South & Shoreditch") |

**Shoreditch and Finsbury** was a [parliamentary constituency](/wiki/United_Kingdom_constituencies "United Kingdom constituencies") centred on the [Shoreditch](/wiki/Shoreditch "Shoreditch") district of the [East End of London](/wiki/East_End_of_London "East End of London") and the adjacent [Finsbury](/wiki/Finsbury "Finsbury") area. It returned one [Member of Parliament](/wiki/Member_of_Parliament_(United_Kingdom) "Member of Parliament (United Kingdom)") (MP) to the [House of Commons](/wiki/House_of_Commons_of_the_United_Kingdom "House of Commons of the United Kingdom") of the [Parliament of the United Kingdom](/wiki/Parliament_of_the_United_Kingdom "Parliament of the United Kingdom"), using the [first-past-the-post](/wiki/First-past-the-post "First-past-the-post") system of voting.

The constituency was created for the [1950 general election](/wiki/1950_United_Kingdom_general_election "1950 United Kingdom general election"), partially replacing the previous [Shoreditch](/wiki/Shoreditch_(UK_Parliament_constituency) "Shoreditch (UK Parliament constituency)") and [Finsbury](/wiki/Finsbury_(UK_Parliament_constituency) "Finsbury (UK Parliament constituency)") constituencies, which had seen a significant fall in population.

Shoreditch and Finsbury was itself abolished for the [February 1974 general election](/wiki/February_1974_United_Kingdom_general_election "February 1974 United Kingdom general election"), when its territory was divided between two new constituencies: [Islington South & Finsbury](/wiki/Islington_South_%26_Finsbury "Islington South & Finsbury") and [Hackney South & Shoreditch](/wiki/Hackney_South_%26_Shoreditch "Hackney South & Shoreditch").

## Boundaries

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Shoreditch_and_Finsbury&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Boundaries")]

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/7/78/ShoreditchFinsbury1950.png/330px-ShoreditchFinsbury1950.png)](/wiki/File:ShoreditchFinsbury1950.png)

Shoreditch and Finsbury in London 1950-74

The constituency consisted of the [Metropolitan Borough of Shoreditch](/wiki/Metropolitan_Borough_of_Shoreditch "Metropolitan Borough of Shoreditch") and the [Metropolitan Borough of Finsbury](/wiki/Metropolitan_Borough_of_Finsbury "Metropolitan Borough of Finsbury"). In 1965, Shoreditch was absorbed into the [London Borough of Hackney](/wiki/London_Borough_of_Hackney "London Borough of Hackney") and Finsbury into the [London Borough of Islington](/wiki/London_Borough_of_Islington "London Borough of Islington"); however the constituency boundaries remained unchanged until the seat disappeared in 1974.

## Members of Parliament

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Shoreditch_and_Finsbury&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Members of Parliament")]

| Election | | Member | Party | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  | [1950](/wiki/1950_United_Kingdom_general_election "1950 United Kingdom general election") | [Ernest Thurtle](/wiki/Ernest_Thurtle "Ernest Thurtle") | [Labour](/wiki/Labour_Party_(UK) "Labour Party (UK)") | Died in office August 1954 |
|  | [1954 by-election](/wiki/1954_Shoreditch_and_Finsbury_by-election "1954 Shoreditch and Finsbury by-election") | [Victor Collins](/wiki/Victor_Collins,_Baron_Stonham "Victor Collins, Baron Stonham") | [Labour](/wiki/Labour_Party_(UK) "Labour Party (UK)") | Resigned August 1958 on being raised to the peerage |
|  | [1958 by-election](/wiki/1958_Shoreditch_and_Finsbury_by-election "1958 Shoreditch and Finsbury by-election") | [Michael Cliffe](/wiki/Michael_Cliffe "Michael Cliffe") | [Labour](/wiki/Labour_Party_(UK) "Labour Party (UK)") |
|  | [1964](/wiki/1964_United_Kingdom_general_election "1964 United Kingdom general election") | [Ronald Brown](/wiki/Ronald_Brown_(English_politician) "Ronald Brown (English politician)") | [Labour](/wiki/Labour_Party_(UK) "Labour Party (UK)") |
| [Feb 1974](/wiki/February_1974_United_Kingdom_general_election "February 1974 United Kingdom general election") | | *constituency abolished* | |
